libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property setup appears necessary. Meaningful coverage can be reached with in-memory tests of WebDAV XML/property/client-method classes and lightweight request/response stubs or mocks rather than a live WebDAV server.

deterministic_setup.reason: The resolved jackrabbit-webdav 2.0-beta4 POM declares servlet-api as a provided dependency, and public classes such as AbstractWebdavServlet, InputContextImpl, and OutputContextImpl reference javax.servlet.http types that tests need to compile and load.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact's parent pins servlet-api 2.3; using a newer servlet API may work but is less faithful to the resolved dependency contract.
Full integration coverage of an actual WebDAV servlet/container would require more infrastructure, but the library has broad public API coverage available without it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav exposes and uses the Servlet API in public server/io classes, while its POM declares javax.servlet:servlet-api only as provided, so the normal test scaffold will not get those types transitively.
